name: Scheduled API Sync → Database
description: Fetches data from an external API on a schedule, normalizes the JSON structure, and syncs it into a target database table. Good for keeping local data up to date with third-party APIs.

required_secrets.description: PostgreSQL connection URL for the target database

replacements.config_delta: Replace SOURCE_URL+TARGET_TABLE with a custom QUERY string (e.g. INSERT INTO synced_records ... ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE). Use when you need upsert semantics, multi-step transactions, or custom conflict resolution beyond a bulk INSERT.

Replace SELECTOR+TRANSFORM with MODEL + SYSTEM_PROMPT (e.g. 'Extract and normalize the following fields into a flat JSON object: ...'). Required secret: llm/api_key added. Useful when the API response schema varies by record or requires semantic interpretation.
